compiled_state.title: create-dso-app.sh: install completes -> .claude/scripts/dso shim missing
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
After running create-dso-app.sh, the .claude/scripts/dso shim is not present in the project. This shim is referenced throughout CLAUDE.md and is required for all dso CLI commands to work.
